setup_sql: CREATE TABLE quackgis.main.catalog_fixture(id BIGINT, name VARCHAR, geom_wkb BLOB, geog BLOB)
copy_sql: COPY quackgis.main.catalog_fixture (id, name, geom_wkb, geog) FROM STDIN

spatial_type_lookup.sql: SELECT t.typname, t.typtype, t.typelem, r.rngsubtype, t.typbasetype, n.nspname, t.typrelid FROM pg_catalog.pg_type t LEFT OUTER JOIN pg_catalog.pg_range r ON r.rngtypid = t.oid INNER JOIN pg_catalog.pg_namespace n ON t.typnamespace = n.oid WHERE t.oid = $1

geometry.query: SELECT geom_wkb FROM quackgis.main.catalog_fixture ORDER BY id
geometry.text_query: SELECT geom_wkb FROM quackgis.main.catalog_fixture WHERE id = 1

geography.query: SELECT geog FROM quackgis.main.catalog_fixture ORDER BY id
geography.text_query: SELECT geog FROM quackgis.main.catalog_fixture WHERE id = 1

metadata_queries.sql: SELECT table_schema, table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_catalog = 'quackgis' AND table_schema = 'main' AND table_name = 'catalog_fixture'
SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_catalog = 'quackgis' AND table_schema = 'main' AND table_name = 'catalog_fixture' ORDER BY ordinal_position
SELECT n.nspname, r.rolname FROM pg_catalog.pg_namespace n INNER JOIN pg_catalog.pg_roles r ON r.oid = n.nspowner WHERE n.nspname IN ('pg_catalog', 'public') ORDER BY n.nspname

ordinary_catalog_query.sql: SELECT oid, typname, typnamespace, typtype, typdelim, typarray FROM pg_catalog.pg_type WHERE oid IN (90001, 90002) ORDER BY oid

builtin_type_query.sql: SELECT oid, typname, typtype, typelem, typlen FROM pg_type WHERE oid IN (20, 29, 28, 25, 90001, 27, 26) ORDER BY oid

unresolved_queries: SELECT count(*)::BIGINT FROM pg_type t LEFT JOIN pg_type e ON e.oid = t.typelem LEFT JOIN pg_type a ON a.oid = t.typarray LEFT JOIN pg_collation c ON c.oid = t.typcollation WHERE (t.typelem <> 0 AND e.oid IS NULL) OR (t.typarray <> 0 AND (a.oid IS NULL OR a.typelem <> t.oid)) OR (t.typcategory = 'A' AND t.typelem <> 0 AND e.typarray <> t.oid) OR (t.typcollation <> 0 AND c.oid IS NULL)
SELECT count(*)::BIGINT FROM pg_type t LEFT JOIN pg_namespace n ON n.oid = t.typnamespace WHERE n.oid IS NULL
SELECT count(*)::BIGINT FROM pg_namespace n LEFT JOIN pg_roles r ON r.oid = n.nspowner WHERE r.oid IS NULL
SELECT count(*)::BIGINT FROM pg_collation c LEFT JOIN pg_namespace n ON n.oid = c.collnamespace LEFT JOIN pg_roles r ON r.oid = c.collowner WHERE n.oid IS NULL OR r.oid IS NULL
